effect.name: Foldover Distortion
effect.description:
Foldover Distortion (LADSPA 1213)
Uses a sine wave approximation to simulate valve style foldover distortion. Probably should have a DC Offset Remover on the output, but it's not always necessary.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Skew
parameter.comment: Controls the asymmetry of the waveform
